description: Composition White shorts that have two side pockets, two back pockets, stitch detailing, embroidery on the right pocket at the back, has two patch pockets, zipped and buttoned closure with a crystal embellishment, a drawstring and belt loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Her cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little girl in these shorts from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
